summary: Bug-fix verification for /studio white-screen. All 7 checks pass on PREVIEW. Sanity Studio static bundle serves correctly (title='Sanity Studio', 8667-byte HTML, favicon 1200 bytes, JS bundle 5,034,558 bytes application/javascript). Main site renders Hero. Footer 'Manage Content' link (data-testid='footer-studio-link') present with href='/studio/'. Backend /api/ welcome and POST /api/appointments both work.

verified_checks.result: PASS — 'New Look Beauty Parlour API — Where Beauty Meets Perfection'
PASS — 200 with id returned (payload requires preferred_date/preferred_time fields, not date/time)

verified_checks.check: Studio JS actually initializes in browser
verified_checks.result: PASS — after 9s wait, page.title()='Sanity Studio' and Sanity CORS gate UI renders ('Before you continue... add the following URL as a CORS origin'). This confirms the studio bundle downloaded and executed. The CORS gate is expected on the preview origin (user added prod origin only); on production https://luxe-beauty-parlour-4.emergent.host the gate should pass once user redeploys.

action_items: USER ACTION: Click Deploy in Emergent UI to push /studio/ bundle to production https://luxe-beauty-parlour-4.emergent.host/studio/. Preview verified working; production still shows old build until redeploy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Studio is served as static assets from frontend/public/studio/. Preview URL /studio/ works. Production requires user-triggered deploy. Appointments endpoint expects fields preferred_date & preferred_time (not date/time).
